parameters.url: =https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/{{ $('🔀 Smart Content Router').item.json.node_insta }}/media?media_type=CAROUSEL&children={{ $json.children_ids }}&caption={{ encodeURIComponent($('🔀 Smart Content Router').item.json.caption) }}

parameters.content:
## 🔄 Container Processing Pipeline
1. **Create Container** → After Getting Container ID
2. **Wait & Poll** → Check if container processing is complete  
3. **Status Check** → Verify FINISHED status before publishing
4. **Auto-Retry** → If not ready, wait and check again

## 📤 Smart Publishing System
Route automatically selected based on post_type prefix:
- http_* → Uses HTTP Request nodes
- fb_* → Uses Facebook Graph API nodes

assignments.name: Midia
assignments.value: ={{ [$json["Link do Google Drive"], $json["Link Mídia 2 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 3 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 4 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 5 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 6 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 7 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 8 (Carrossel)"], $json["Link Mídia 9 (Carrossel)"]].filter(url => url).map(url => url.includes("drive.google.com") && url.match(/(?:\/file\/d\/|id=)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)/) ? "https://drive.usercontent.google.com/download?id=" + url.match(/(?:\/file\/d\/|id=)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)/)[1] + "&export=download" : url) }}

parameters.dateTime: ={{ (() => { const d = $json['Data de Publicação']; if (!d) return $now.toISO(); const num = parseFloat(d); if (!isNaN(num) && num > 40000 && num < 60000) { const utcTimestamp = (num - 25569) * 86400 * 1000; return new Date(utcTimestamp).toISOString().replace('Z', '-03:00'); } if (typeof d === 'string') { const parts = d.match(/^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})\s+(\d{2}):(\d{2})$/); if (parts) { return `${parts[3]}-${parts[2]}-${parts[1]}T${parts[4]}:${parts[5]}:00-03:00`; } } try { const parsed = new Date(d); if (!isNaN(parsed.getTime())) { return parsed.toISOString(); } } catch (e) {} return $now.toISO(); })() }}

parameters.content:
## 👨‍💻 Creator Information

**Created by:** Lakshit Ukani  
🔗 **LinkedIn:** [Connect with me](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lakshit-ukani/)
🔗 **Youtube:** [Subscribe to my Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@lakshit-ukani?sub_confirmation=1)

### 🤝 Community & Support
💬 **Join Community:** [Skool Community Link](https://www.skool.com/ai-automation-club-7843)   
📚 **Documentation:** [Full Guide & FAQ](https://developers.facebook.com/docs/instagram-platform/instagram-graph-api/reference/ig-user/media#creating)  

### 📞 Need Help?
- **Quick Questions:** Comment on the YouTube video
- **Workflow Issues:** Post in our community  
- **Business Inquiries:** Connect via LinkedIn

## 📘 Facebook Page Publishing

Direct publishing of posts to Facebook Page (without processing queue):
- **Photo**: Published directly to page photos
- **Video**: Published directly to page videos
- **Carousel**: If the carousel contains videos, the first video is automatically published as a single video post (API limitation fallback). If it contains only photos, they are uploaded unpublished and published together as a feed post.
